name: clean head CT trauma — no acute intracranial finding

report.indication: Mechanical fall from standing height. GCS 15.
report.technique: Non-contrast CT of the head, 2.5 mm axial reconstructions.
report.findings: Intracranial: no acute intracranial haemorrhage. No mass effect or midline shift. Extra-axial: no subdural or epidural collection. Skull: no fracture. Soft tissues: small left frontal scalp haematoma.
report.impression:
1. No acute intracranial haemorrhage or fracture.
2. Small left frontal scalp haematoma.
